notableEvents.label: Hunter Feduccia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Feduccia grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Jake Fraley scores. Ben Williamson to 3rd. Cedric Mullins out at 2nd. Hunter Feduccia out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Feduccia rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Feduccia grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Jake Fraley scores. Ben Williamson to 3rd. Cedric Mullins out at 2nd. Hunter Feduccia out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Kevin Gausman. Jake Fraley to 3rd. Ben Williamson to 2nd. Cedric Mullins to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw pops out to second baseman Ben Williamson.
